---
title: "Overall Technical Scheme"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Global rendering configuration for the whole project
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.dpi = 300,
  fig.align = "center"
)
```

# Module Description
Pure report document without analysis code. Records overall research design, technical workflow, unified screening thresholds, universal parameters, module analysis standards, research innovations, limitations and schematic interpretation.
